title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
